title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: Nine Asia-Pacific jurisdictions are simultaneously executing VASP licensing, institutional custody standards, and AML enforcement through September 2026. Australia's AUSTRAC transitions from implementation to active Travel Rule enforcement while Treasury consults on stablecoin payment licensing—the first major market to regulate crypto payment gateways as PSPs. Southeast Asian regulators face Q3 custody and registration deadlines creating immediate compliance infrastructure demand across exchang
